_comment5: Blocks in this tag BYPASS all property checks and are always accepted
_comment6: as texture sources for switch customization.
_comment10: - Add tag references with required:false (see IMPORTANT note below):
_comment13: IMPORTANT: Tag references (#) from other mods MUST use required:false
_comment14: or the entire file will fail to load if that mod is not installed.
_comment15: Vanilla tags (e.g. #minecraft:planks) can be added as plain strings.
_comment17: WARNING: Transparent/translucent blocks (glass, ice, slime, honey)
_comment18: will render as solid colors without transparency on switches.
_comment21: Create a datapack with this same file path to add blocks:
_comment32: NOTE: Blocks that pass property validation work automatically
